title: Automation to send email when date arrives

posts.author: koh (KLK)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I am new to automation etc, so hopefully you can help me please.
Just wondering how I can create an automation to send an email via outlook when a date arrives, to tell the recipient what has expired etc.
For example. when a supplier’s insurance certificate expires. I would like Monday to send an email out to the supplier to tell them what has expired and ask them to send a new one.
Many thanks.
